chunks.text: iqbal ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2805 of 2021 Dr. Shamim Qureshi Versus Jinnah Sindh Medical University Karachi & another Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 20.06.2025 Mr. Muhammad Haseeb Jamali for petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General. Mr. Abdul Samad for HEC. Mr. Bhuromal, Director Legal Affairs JSMU. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition as the circumstances have changed during pending of instant petition and petitioner would be seeking proforma promotion. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn, however, petitioner shall be at liberty to file fresh petition on new grounds, which are existing, if so advised. Head of Const. Benches Judge
